text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 230 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_MOPP_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Split Network Preferred Mail Order — Number of Days in Two-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a two-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using a 
mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 5
